summary: Iteration 9: Trade System Phase 2 & 3 testing complete. Backend: 20/20 tests passed for shipping, confirming, disputes, ratings, and admin endpoints. Frontend: All UI features verified - Trades page with SHIPPING/CONFIRMING/COMPLETED statuses, shipping status section, tracking number inputs, confirm-receipt button, dispute section with reason/photos/response, 'Trade Completed!' banner, star rating (1-5) UI with review textarea, and Admin Disputes dashboard at /admin/disputes with Open/Resolved tabs and resolve modal.
passed_tests: BACKEND: PUT /api/trades/{id}/accept - sets status to SHIPPING with shipping_deadline (5 days) and empty shipping object - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/trades/{id}/ship - first party ships, status stays SHIPPING - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/trades/{id}/ship - cannot ship twice (400) - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/trades/{id}/ship - both parties ship, status moves to CONFIRMING with 48h deadline - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/trades/{id}/confirm-receipt - first confirm keeps CONFIRMING status - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/trades/{id}/confirm-receipt - both confirm completes trade (COMPLETED) - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/trades/{id}/cancel-shipping - fails before deadline (400) - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/trades/{id}/cancel-shipping - validation requires shipping first - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/trades/{id}/dispute - opens dispute, sets status to DISPUTED - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/trades/{id}/dispute/respond - cannot respond to own dispute (400) - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/trades/{id}/dispute/respond - other party can respond - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/trades/{id}/rate - rate completed trade (1-5 stars) - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/trades/{id}/rate - cannot rate twice (400) - PASSED
BACKEND: POST /api/trades/{id}/rate - cannot rate non-completed trade (400) - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/users/{username}/ratings - returns average and count - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/trades/can-initiate - returns can_trade and unrated_trade_ids - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/disputes - requires admin (403 for non-admin) - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/disputes - admin can view open disputes - PASSED
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/disputes/all - admin can view all disputes including resolved - PASSED
BACKEND: PUT /api/admin/disputes/{id}/resolve - COMPLETED resolution - PASSED
FRONTEND: Trades page shows SHIPPING status with shipping summary - PASSED
FRONTEND: Trade detail modal shows SHIPPING STATUS section with both parties' state - PASSED
FRONTEND: Tracking number input and Submit Tracking button visible for SHIPPING trades - PASSED
FRONTEND: Shipping deadline shown (Ship by date) - PASSED
FRONTEND: COMPLETED trades show 'Trade Completed!' banner - PASSED
FRONTEND: COMPLETED trades show 'Records have been transferred to both collections.' - PASSED
FRONTEND: Rating prompt 'Rate @username' button visible for completed unrated trades - PASSED
FRONTEND: Star rating UI (1-5 stars) with interactive selection - PASSED
FRONTEND: Review textarea 'How was the experience? (optional)' - PASSED
FRONTEND: Dispute section shows reason, response, and resolution - PASSED
FRONTEND: Admin Disputes page at /admin/disputes - PASSED
FRONTEND: Admin page shows Open and Resolved tabs - PASSED
FRONTEND: Open tab shows 'No open disputes' when all resolved - PASSED
FRONTEND: Resolved tab shows dispute cards with reason, response, resolution - PASSED
FRONTEND: Dispute cards show Resolution outcome badge (COMPLETED) - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Added 5 test records to trader's collection for Phase 2/3 testing. Created multiple trades through full PROPOSED → SHIPPING → CONFIRMING → COMPLETED flow. Created disputes with responses and admin resolutions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trade System Phase 2 & 3 fully tested. Full trade lifecycle: PROPOSED → ACCEPTED → SHIPPING (5-day deadline, both submit tracking) → CONFIRMING (48h deadline, both confirm receipt) → COMPLETED (record transfer). Dispute flow: Either party opens dispute → Other responds (24h) → Admin resolves (COMPLETED/CANCELLED/PARTIAL). Mandatory rating (1-5 stars) required before next trade. Admin disputes dashboard at /admin/disputes shows Open/Resolved disputes with Resolve button.

features: Both ship moves to CONFIRMING with 48h deadline
Cancel-shipping checks deadline and ship status
Open dispute with reason and photos
Other party responds with text and photos

components: SHIPPING STATUS section in trade detail modal
Both parties' ship state with icons
Tracking number input and Submit Tracking button
Dispute section with reason, photos, response
Dispute cards with trade info and participants

full_flow: PROPOSED → ACCEPTED (listing owner accepts) → SHIPPING (5 days to ship)
COMPLETED → Mandatory rating before next trade
